iti28:1.3: "Dvīhi, bhikkhave, dhammehi samannāgato bhikkhu diṭṭheva dhamme dukkhaṁ viharati savighātaṁ saupāyāsaṁ sapariḷāhaṁ; kāyassa bhedā paraṁ maraṇā duggati pāṭikaṅkhā. Katamehi dvīhi? Indriyesu aguttadvāratāya ca, bhojane amattaññutāya ca. Imehi kho, bhikkhave, dvīhi dhammehi samannāgato bhikkhu diṭṭheva dhamme dukkhaṁ viharati savighātaṁ saupāyāsaṁ sapariḷāhaṁ; kāyassa bhedā paraṁ maraṇā duggati pāṭikaṅkhā"ti. Etamatthaṁ bhagavā avoca. Tatthetaṁ iti vuccati:
iti28:1.4:
"Cakkhu sotañca ghānañca,
jivhā kāyo tathā mano;
Etāni yassa dvārāni,
aguttāni ca bhikkhuno.
iti28:1.5:
Bhojanamhi amattaññū,
indriyesu asaṁvuto;
Kāyadukkhaṁ cetodukkhaṁ,
dukkhaṁ so adhigacchati.
iti28:1.6:
Ḍayhamānena kāyena,
Ḍayhamānena cetasā;
Divā vā yadi vā rattiṁ,
Dukkhaṁ viharati tādiso"ti.
iti28:1.7:
Ayampi attho vutto bhagavatā, iti me sutanti.
Paṭhamaṁ.
